mapper.insert: INSERT INTO att_leave_request (user_id, instance_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, duration, reason, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{instanceId}, #{leaveType}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{duration}, #{reason}, #{status})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, instance_id, leave_type, start_time, end_time, duration, reason, status, create_time FROM att_leave_request WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM att_leave_request WHERE user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE att_leave_request SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT leave_type, total_days, used_days, (total_days - used_days) AS remaining_days FROM att_leave_quota WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year}
SELECT leave_type, total_days, used_days, (total_days - used_days) AS remaining_days FROM att_leave_quota WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year} AND leave_type = #{leaveType}
mapper.update: UPDATE att_leave_quota SET used_days = used_days + #{days} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND year = #{year} AND leave_type = #{leaveType} AND (total_days - used_days) >= #{days}
